summary: The video shows a vehicle traveling on a multi-laned road with snowbanks alongside the roadside. A silver sedan overtakes the recording vehicle from the right side, passing closely. The recording vehicle then veers sharply to avoid colliding with the overtaking car, resulting in a loss of control.

events_timeline.event: A silver sedan overtakes the recording vehicle from the right side.
The recording vehicle veers sharply to avoid colliding with the overtaking car.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the overtaking car is unclear.
Precise reason for the sharp veering maneuver is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: The recording vehicle loses control due to the sudden overtaking maneuver, indicating a high-risk situation.
